query: SELECT id, name, latitude, longitude, address FROM stores WHERE name ILIKE '%spar%' OR name ILIKE '%balbriggan%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user TRWPPSjpVsMrzts.root --database HH4sKdeJGjocgFW8dJxnCN --execute SELECT id, name, latitude, longitude, address FROM stores WHERE name ILIKE '%spar%' OR name ILIKE '%balbriggan%';

rows.name: Spar Balbriggan
rows.address: Drogheda Street, Balbriggan, Co. Dublin, Ireland
